cacheModel.note: Cache economics are modeled from live prompt sizes, not billed API receipts.

tasks.encoded: ITP:DL Rex: RV the CPS repo, run the validator agent, and RP status. Priority: P0. Deliverable: completion RP in reports/.
tasks.original: Delegate to Rex: review the ClawPowers-Skills repo, run the validator agent, and report status. Priority: P0. Deliverable: completion report in reports/.

tasks.encoded: ITP:EX: DP CPS v2.2.0 to NM, then UP CPA dependency to 2.2.0, then publish CPA v1.1.0.
tasks.original: Execute: deploy ClawPowers-Skills v2.2.0 to npm, then update ClawPowers-Agent dependency to 2.2.0, then publish ClawPowers-Agent v1.1.0.

tasks.encoded: ITP:ST to Max: AW-O up and healthy, AW-TW up, AW-RT up. All 7 trading containers green. No action required.
tasks.original: Status report to Max: AlphaWolf orchestrator up and healthy, AlphaWolf trend-watcher up, AlphaWolf ready-trader up. All 7 trading containers green. No action required.

tasks.encoded: ITP:EX: MN BPT, CK trading status, FX any unhealthy containers, and RP status back to Max within 5 minutes. Priority P0.
tasks.original: Execute: monitor btc-perp-trader, check trading status, fix any unhealthy containers, and report status back to Max within 5 minutes. Priority P0.

tasks.encoded: ITP:Rex, please EX the AU on AW, FX the high severity findings, and MG the PR. Priority P1. ST when done.
tasks.original: Rex, please execute the audit on wallet module, fix the high severity findings, and merge the PR. Priority P1. Status report when done.

tasks.encoded: Run the validator agent on ClawPowers-Skills before publishing. Check compile gate, lint, tests, security audit, type coverage, docs, changelog, and final review.
tasks.original: Run the validator agent on ClawPowers-Skills before publishing. Check compile gate, lint, tests, security audit, type coverage, docs, changelog, and final review.

tasks.encoded: ITP:DL ED: RB the CPA dependency graph, TS the import chain, DP to NM, and RP status with completion RP.
tasks.original: Delegate to Engineering Director: rebuild the ClawPowers-Agent dependency graph, test the import chain, deploy to npm, and report status with completion report.

tasks.encoded: ITP:Status: CPS tests passing 261 of 261, CPA tests passing 132 of 132, both repos committed and pushed to main. Ready for NM publish.
tasks.original: Status: ClawPowers-Skills tests passing 261 of 261, ClawPowers-Agent tests passing 132 of 132, both repos committed and pushed to main. Ready for npm publish.

tasks.encoded: ITP:SC CPA for security issues, AU the dependency tree, RM any critical vulnerabilities, and UP the changelog. Priority P1.
tasks.original: Scan ClawPowers-Agent for security issues, audit the dependency tree, remove any critical vulnerabilities, and update the changelog. Priority P1.

tasks.encoded: ITP:DL Rex: RV the release checklist, verify NM package contents, CK version tags, and RP status. Priority: P0. Deliverable: completion RP.
tasks.original: Delegate to Rex: review the release checklist, verify npm package contents, check version tags, and report status. Priority: P0. Deliverable: completion report.

tasks.encoded: ITP:ST: trading bots all healthy, BPT balance $9617, PT5 at 44.6% DD which exceeds the 30% threshold. Alert level P0.
tasks.original: Status report: trading bots all healthy, btc-perp-trader balance $9617, paper-trader-v5 at 44.6% drawdown which exceeds the 30% threshold. Alert level P0.

tasks.encoded: Status report: all 8 swarm cron groups running clean, exit code 0 across the board. Infrastructure monitor flagged 10KB of stderr warnings but they are cosmetic.
tasks.original: Status report: all 8 swarm cron groups running clean, exit code 0 across the board. Infrastructure monitor flagged 10KB of stderr warnings but they are cosmetic.

tasks.encoded: ITP:EX: MN BPT, CK trading status, FX any unhealthy containers, and RP status back to Max within 5 minutes. Priority P0.
tasks.original: Execute: monitor btc-perp-trader, check trading status, fix any unhealthy containers, and report status back to Max within 5 minutes. Priority P0.

tasks.encoded: ITP:DL TD: CK DK, AN current regime, UP position status, and RP status in metrics-only format. Priority P0.
tasks.original: Delegate to Trading Director: check Docker containers, analyze current regime, update position status, and report status in metrics-only format. Priority P0.

tasks.encoded: ITP:ST to Max: AW-O up and healthy, AW-TW up, AW-RT up. All 7 trading containers green. No action required.
tasks.original: Status report to Max: AlphaWolf orchestrator up and healthy, AlphaWolf trend-watcher up, AlphaWolf ready-trader up. All 7 trading containers green. No action required.
